title: To Understand Pope Leo’s Efforts on A.I., Look at the Man Shaking His Hand
summary_full: The co-founder of a prominent A.I. company was nearby as the pope implored A.I. leaders to slow down and consider the technology’s possible perils.
summary_public: The co-founder of a prominent A.I. company was nearby as the pope implored A.I. leaders to slow down and consider the technology’s possible perils.
